critical_findings.description: VS Code authentication token / credential theft

high_findings.description: Bundled module 'keytar' has 'install': prebuild-install || npm run build
Bundled module 'minimist' has 'prepublish': not-in-publish || npm run prepublishOnly

medium_findings.code_snippet: const panel = vscode.window.createWebviewPanel('masterlockLogo', 'MasterLock Logo', vscode.ViewColumn.One, { enableScripts: true });

medium_findings.description: Publisher domain is NOT verified by Microsoft
Webview panel with scripts enabled (potential C2 channel)

info_findings.description: No domain associated with publisher profile
